<> $text = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $text = str_replace("http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", "http://yahoo.com/abc1", $text); echo $text; This code replaces the URL "http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1" with "http://yahoo.com/abc1" in the given string. The replacement works even if the string contains multiple occurrences of the URL. Here's a palindrome in the response: **"A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"**
